== Notes for [[Item:Q99692|Q99692]] ==

According to Moshe Gil,

Google Books:

[https://books.google.com/books?id=8vTTCwG0nKIC&pg=PA383&lpg=PA383&dq=mishoi+gaon&source=bl&ots=GDHXNp42zt&sig=Bq93YZHVMZ_Xp52tI2uYeHbybDc&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0CDMQ6AEwBGoVChMI5o7c8sCJyAIVUTmICh2_dgsp#v=onepage&q=mishoi%20gaon&f=false Jews in Islamic Countries in the Middle Ages /Moše Gîl: Sherira Gaon, and his family.]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD79A3031EFBBFA9822EF79916C1B48
geni:6000000000804284740

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
